summary: Completed testing of HR Dashboard Iteration 3 features. All new features working correctly: combined sync endpoint, sync status, vendor-to-role mapping, interview slot normalization, and Interviews page search/filter. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: POST /api/sync-all returns candidates_count, openings_count, timestamp (synced 59 candidates, 41 openings)
GET /api/sync/status returns last sync info with timestamp
/api/sync-all requires admin authentication (returns 401 for unauthenticated)
GET /api/analytics/roles returns vendors array per role with name+count structure
Vendor mapping structure has correct fields (name, count as integer)
Roles endpoint still has core fields (_id, total, active, selected)
GET /api/analytics/interviews returns interview records (14 records found)
Interviews include records with interview_status even without slot
Interview slot field is normalized (or null if not set)
Interviews count >= 10 as expected (14 found)
KPIs endpoint still works correctly (59 candidates)
Frontend: Sync Google Sheets button calls /api/sync-all and shows success message
Frontend: Job Openings cards show vendor tags with counts (e.g., Quesscorp 4)
Frontend: Job Openings modal shows Vendor Contributions section with progress bars
Frontend: Interviews page has search bar
Frontend: Interviews page has L1/L2/All level filter buttons
Frontend: Interviews page shows 14 interview records
Frontend: Interview row click opens detail modal with slot, interviewer, status, feedback
Frontend: Home page KPI cards work correctly (41 openings, 59 candidates, 16 interviews, 0 selected)
Frontend: Analysis page conversion metrics and vendor table functional
Frontend: Contacts page search and type filters work
Frontend: Candidates page export button and filters work
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - Google Sheets sync populated 59 candidates and 41 openings
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features working. Combined sync endpoint /api/sync-all syncs both candidates and openings from Google Sheets. Vendor-to-role mapping shows vendor contributions per role with progress bars. Interviews page now shows 14 records (based on interview_status_l1, not just slots) with search and L1/L2 filter. Google Sheets sync works when sheets are public - currently synced 59 candidates and 41 openings.

notes.sync_behavior: Google Sheets sync succeeded - sheets appear to be public. Synced 59 candidates and 41 openings.
notes.interviews_count: 14 interview records found (more than the expected 10 - includes both L1 and L2 interviews)
notes.vendor_mapping: Vendor tags visible on Job Openings cards (e.g., Quesscorp 4). Modal shows Vendor Contributions with progress bars.
